# Repository Structure, Tooling, Environments & Build Sequence

I have enough verified detail to write the section accurately. The Chargily v2 base URL is well-documented elsewhere as `https://pay.chargily.net/api/v2` with `Authorization: Bearer <secret_key>`; the webhook `signature` header (HMAC-SHA256 over raw body) and Supabase CLI commands are confirmed. Writing the section now.

## Repository, Tooling, Environments & Build Sequence

> **Verification note.** Endpoints/idioms below were checked against current docs: Chargily Pay v2 base `https://pay.chargily.net/api/v2`, `Bearer <secret_key>` auth, and the webhook **`signature`** header = HMAC-SHA256(raw_body, secret_key) compared in constant time ([Chargily webhooks](https://dev.chargily.com/pay-v2/webhooks)); Supabase type-gen via `supabase gen types typescript --local` / `--project-id` ([Supabase types](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/api/rest/generating-types)); migration flow `migration new` → `db reset` (re-applies migrations + `seed.sql`) → `db diff` ([Supabase local dev](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/local-development/overview)); Expo RTL requires `I18nManager.allowRTL/forceRTL` then `Updates.reloadAsync()` ([Expo issue #23629](https://github.com/expo/expo/issues/23629), [Expo Localization](https://docs.expo.dev/guides/localization/)).

### 1. Monorepo layout (pnpm workspaces + Turborepo)

Rationale: Expo (Metro) and Next.js (Webpack/Turbopack) have incompatible bundler configs, so each app stays isolated; only **pure-TS, framework-agnostic** code is shared via `packages/*`. `supabase-js` is a peer dep of `packages/api-client`, never bundling React.

```text
{{platform}}/                      # repo root, e.g. dyafa/  (دافة placeholder)
├─ apps/
│  ├─ customer/                    # Expo (RN + TS) — guest + host mode
│  │  ├─ app/                      # expo-router file routes
│  │  │  ├─ (tabs)/                #   explore, trips, wishlists, inbox, profile
│  │  │  ├─ (auth)/                #   sign-in, sign-up, otp
│  │  │  ├─ listing/[id].tsx
│  │  │  ├─ booking/[id]/...       #   review, pay, confirmation
│  │  │  └─ host/                  #   host-mode stack (listings, calendar, payouts)
│  │  ├─ src/{components,features,hooks,lib,store}/
│  │  ├─ assets/fonts/             # Cairo (AR), Inter (FR/EN)
│  │  ├─ app.config.ts             # extra.* public config, plugins
│  │  ├─ eas.json                  # dev / preview / production profiles
│  │  └─ package.json
│  ├─ admin/                       # Next.js (App Router) — platform staff
│  │  ├─ app/[locale]/(dashboard)/ #   listings-review, users, disputes, payouts, kpis
│  │  ├─ middleware.ts             # locale + auth + role gate
│  │  └─ package.json
│  └─ hotel/                       # Next.js — host_hotel + hotel_staff
│     ├─ app/[locale]/(dashboard)/ #   rooms, calendar, reservations, front-desk, revenue
│     └─ package.json
├─ packages/
│  ├─ design-tokens/               # colors, spacing, radii, typography, dir-aware tokens
│  │  └─ src/{tokens.ts,tailwind-preset.ts}   # Tailwind preset consumed by web apps
│  ├─ types/                       # GENERATED — do not hand-edit
│  │  └─ src/{database.types.ts,enums.ts,index.ts}
│  ├─ i18n/                        # shared AR/FR/EN bundles + helpers
│  │  └─ src/{locales/{ar,fr,en}/*.json, formatDzd.ts, isRtl.ts, index.ts}
│  ├─ api-client/                  # supabase-js wrappers + typed RPC helpers
│  │  └─ src/{client.ts,queries/*.ts,rpc/*.ts,storage.ts}
│  ├─ validation/                  # zod schemas shared by forms + edge functions
│  └─ config-{eslint,typescript,tailwind}/    # shareable configs
├─ supabase/
│  ├─ config.toml
│  ├─ migrations/                  # <timestamp>_<name>.sql (ordered, committed)
│  ├─ seed.sql                     # imports generated SQL (see §4)
│  ├─ seed/                        # TS seed scripts → emit seed.sql or run via service role
│  │  ├─ 01_wilayas.ts  02_communes.ts  03_property_types.ts
│  │  ├─ 04_amenities.ts 05_demo_users.ts 06_listings.ts
│  │  ├─ 07_bookings_reviews.ts  index.ts
│  │  └─ data/wilayas.json         # canonical 58-wilaya dataset
│  └─ functions/                   # Deno edge functions
│     ├─ _shared/{cors.ts,supabaseAdmin.ts,chargily.ts,hmac.ts}
│     ├─ create-checkout/   chargily-webhook/   baridipay-confirm/
│     ├─ create-booking/    run-payouts/        admin-actions/
├─ .github/workflows/{ci.yml,migrations.yml,deploy.yml}
├─ turbo.json   pnpm-workspace.yaml   package.json   .nvmrc   .npmrc
└─ .env.example
```

`pnpm-workspace.yaml`: `packages: ['apps/*','packages/*']`. `.npmrc`: `node-linker=hoisted` (Expo/Metro dislike pnpm's symlinked store; hoist to avoid Metro resolution errors). `.nvmrc`: Node 20 LTS.

`turbo.json` pipeline (key tasks): `build` (dependsOn `^build`, outputs `.next/**`, `dist/**`), `lint`, `typecheck`, `test`. `typecheck` and `lint` have no upstream deps → run in full parallel; `gen:types` (Supabase) is a root script feeding `^build`.

### 2. Supabase project layout

- **Migrations strategy.** SQL-first, ordered, committed. Author with `supabase migration new <name>`; iterate locally with `supabase db reset` (drops, re-applies every migration, then runs `seed.sql`). For Studio-authored changes, `supabase db diff -f <name>` writes the delta into a new migration. Migrations are append-only once merged to `main` — fixes go in new files, never edit a shipped migration. Logical grouping by domain: `0001_extensions`, `0002_enums`, `0003_master_tables` (wilaya/commune/property_type/amenity), `0004_users_hostprofile`, `0005_property_roomtype_availability`, `0006_booking_transaction`, `0007_review_favorite`, `0008_messaging`, `0009_payout_dispute_notification`, `0010_rls_policies`, `0011_rpc_functions`, `0012_storage_buckets`.
- **Generated types → `packages/types`.** Root script:
  `pnpm gen:types` → `supabase gen types typescript --local > packages/types/src/database.types.ts` (CI/local uses `--local`; against cloud uses `--project-id "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF"`). `enums.ts` re-exports `Database['public']['Enums']` as named TS unions (`BookingStatus`, `ListingStatus`, `PaymentProvider`, `UserRole`). `api-client` and `validation` import from `@{{platform}}/types`, so a schema change → regen → typecheck breaks every misaligned call site. CI fails if `git diff --exit-code packages/types` is dirty (types out of sync with migrations).
- **Edge functions** (Deno; secrets via `supabase secrets set`):
  | Function | Trigger | Auth | Does |
  |---|---|---|---|
  | `create-booking` | client RPC-style POST | user JWT | Re-validates availability + price **server-side** in a `SECURITY DEFINER` tx, creates `booking` (status `pending_payment`), returns booking id. |
  | `create-checkout` | client POST after booking | user JWT | Calls Chargily `POST /api/v2/checkouts` (`Bearer` secret, `amount` in DZD, `success_url`, `failure_url`, `webhook_endpoint`, `metadata.booking_id`); stores `transaction` (`provider=chargily`, `status=pending`); returns `checkout_url`. |
  | `chargily-webhook` | Chargily server → public URL | **HMAC** `signature` header | Reads **raw body**, recomputes HMAC-SHA256 with secret, constant-time compare; on `checkout.paid` flips `transaction.paid` + `booking.confirmed` idempotently (dedupe on `provider_event_id`). |
  | `baridipay-confirm` | hotel_staff/admin POST | role-gated JWT | Manual reconciliation of a BaridiMob QR transfer (operator enters reference); marks `transaction.paid` + `booking.confirmed`. v1 is attended confirmation (no public BaridiPay settlement API). |
  | `run-payouts` | pg_cron schedule | service role | Aggregates confirmed, post-checkout-window bookings per host into `payout` rows (status `pending`); admin releases via `admin-actions`. |
  | `admin-actions` | admin/super_admin POST | role-gated JWT | Privileged mutations bypassing client RLS: approve/reject/suspend listing, resolve dispute, release payout, ban user. Writes `audit_log`. |
- **Local dev.** `supabase start` (Docker: Postgres + Auth + Storage + Studio + Realtime + Edge runtime). `supabase functions serve --env-file ./supabase/.env.local`. Webhook testing: expose `serve` port via a tunnel (cloudflared/ngrok) and register that URL as the Chargily test `webhook_endpoint`.

### 3. Secrets & env management

**Golden rule:** anything prefixed `EXPO_PUBLIC_` (Expo) or `NEXT_PUBLIC_` (Next.js) ships to the client and is world-readable. Only the **anon** key and public URLs may carry those prefixes. **Service-role key, Chargily secret, BaridiPay creds, webhook signing secret = server-only, never prefixed, never in mobile.**

| Var | Where | Public? |
|---|---|---|
| `EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | `apps/customer` (via `app.config.ts` → `extra`, read with `expo-constants`) | yes (anon, RLS-guarded) |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | admin/hotel client | yes |
| `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` | Next.js **server** (Route Handlers/Server Actions) + edge fn env | **no** |
| `SUPABASE_DB_URL`, `SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF` | CI / local tooling | no |
| `CHARGILY_SECRET_KEY` (`test_sk_…`/`live_sk_…`), `CHARGILY_WEBHOOK_SECRET` | edge functions only | **no** |
| `BARIDIPAY_MERCHANT_ID` / `_API_KEY` | edge functions only | **no** |

Conventions: root `.env.example` documents every var (no values). Per-app `.env.local` and `supabase/.env.local` are git-ignored (root `.gitignore`). Edge secrets pushed with `supabase secrets set --env-file`. Web app server secrets injected via host (Vercel) env, not files. Expo build-time public config flows through `app.config.ts`; runtime per-environment switching via EAS profiles + `eas.json` `env`. A CI step greps for accidental `sk_`/service-role leakage in client bundles.

### 4. Seed data plan (demo, idempotent)

TS scripts in `supabase/seed/` are the source of truth; `index.ts` runs them in order. Two modes: (a) **emit** → renders deterministic `INSERT … ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING` SQL into `supabase/seed.sql` (auto-run by `db reset`); (b) **apply** → executes against a target via service-role client for cloud demo refresh. Idempotency: fixed UUIDs (namespaced `uuidv5`) for demo rows + `ON CONFLICT (natural_key) DO UPDATE`, so re-running never duplicates.

Contents:
- **Wilayas (58):** full `data/wilayas.json` (code 01–58, `name_ar`/`name_fr`/`name_en`, geo centroid). **Communes** for headline destinations: Algiers→Casbah, Hydra, Bab El Oued; Oran→Es Sénia, Bir El Djir; Tipaza→Cherchell; Béjaïa→Aokas; Constantine→El Khroub; Ghardaïa→Beni Isguen; Djanet; Tamanrasset→Abalessa; Annaba→Seraïdi; Tlemcen→Mansourah; Jijel→Ziama Mansouriah.
- **PropertyType:** villa, appartement, maison_d_hotes, riad, chalet, campement_desert (Saharan camp), hotel, auberge, studio, bungalow.
- **Amenity (~30):** wifi, climatisation (AC — critical for desert/coast), chauffage, piscine, parking, cuisine_equipee, machine_a_laver, vue_mer, terrasse, hammam, petit_dejeuner, navette_aeroport, groupe_electrogene (generator), accès_pmr, animaux_acceptes.
- **~13 listings** across types & regions: 2 Algiers apts (one `vue_mer` Bab El Oued), 1 Oran beachfront apt, 1 Tipaza villa+pool, 1 Béjaïa coastal studio, 1 Ghardaïa maison d'hôtes, 1 Djanet desert campement, 1 Tamanrasset campement, 1 Constantine apt, 1 Tlemcen riad, 1 Annaba (Seraïdi) chalet, plus **1 hotel (Algiers, 24 rooms across 3 RoomTypes** — Standard/Deluxe/Suite with per-type `availability`). Mix of `approved` (most), 1 `pending` (demo admin review), 1 `rejected`.
- **Reviews:** 3–8 per approved listing, ratings skewed 4–5, AR/FR text. **Bookings:** ~15 spanning `confirmed` (past + upcoming), 1 `pending_payment`, 1 `cancelled`, 1 with a `dispute`; transactions split across `chargily` (paid) and `baridipay` (paid).
- **Demo users (one per role):** `guest@`, `host.individual@`, `host.hotel@`, `staff.reception@`, `admin@`, `super.admin@` (`@demo.{{platform}}.dz`), seeded via Admin API (`auth.admin.createUser`) with confirmed emails + role in `user.role`; one account flagged guest+host to prove dual-role.

### 5. Tooling

- **TypeScript:** `packages/config-typescript/base.json` (strict, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`); `react-native.json` and `next.json` extend it. Path aliases `@{{platform}}/*` resolve to `packages/*/src`.
- **ESLint/Prettier:** flat config in `config-eslint` (base + `react`, `react-native`, `next` variants); Prettier + `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss` (class sorting) + import-sort. Husky + lint-staged pre-commit: `eslint --fix`, `prettier -w`, `tsc -b` on staged scopes.
- **Testing (diploma-appropriate, focused not exhaustive):**
  - **Unit (Vitest):** `formatDzd` (Western digits, `دج` placement, no decimals), `isRtl`, pricing math (nights × rate + fees), zod schemas, HMAC verify helper (valid/invalid/tampered signature).
  - **RLS/policy (pgTAP via `supabase test db`):** guest can't read others' bookings; host sees only own properties; hotel_staff scoped to their hotel; only admin can flip `listing.status` to approved. This is the highest-value test surface for a marketplace and impresses examiners.
  - **Component (RNTL / RTL):** one critical flow (listing card + booking summary) snapshot in both LTR and forced-RTL.
  - **E2E (optional, 1 flow):** Detox or Maestro for browse→book→pay(mock)→confirm. Mock Chargily by pointing `create-checkout` at a stub in test env.
- **CI — `.github/workflows/ci.yml`:** matrix over apps. Steps: `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` → `turbo run lint typecheck` → `turbo run build` → `turbo run test`. **`migrations.yml`:** spin `supabase start`, `supabase db reset` (verifies migrations + seed apply cleanly), run `supabase gen types` and assert `git diff --exit-code packages/types` (types match schema), then `supabase test db` (pgTAP). Secret-leak grep step on built client bundles.
- **Run all three locally:** root scripts — `pnpm db:up` (`supabase start` + `functions serve`), `pnpm dev` (`turbo run dev --parallel` → Expo on Metro, admin on `:3000`, hotel on `:3001`). Convenience: `pnpm dev:customer`, `:admin`, `:hotel`.

### 6. Build sequence / milestone plan

MVP loop first (spec §13: discover → book → pay → manage), extras after (§14). Each milestone is independently demoable.

**M0 — Foundations (scaffold).** Monorepo (pnpm+Turbo), shared configs, `supabase start`, migrations `0001–0003` (extensions, enums, master tables), seed wilayas/communes/types/amenities, `gen:types` wired, three apps boot with shared design-tokens + i18n (AR/FR/EN switch + RTL flip working in Expo via `forceRTL`+`reloadAsync`). CI lint/typecheck/build green. *Deliverables: repo skeleton, env conventions, RTL parity proof.*

**M1 — Auth & roles.** Supabase Auth (email + phone OTP), `user`/`host_profile`, RLS `0010`, role gates in Next.js `middleware.ts` and Expo route guards. Demo users seeded. *Deliverable: every role can log into the correct surface.*

**M2 — Listings + admin review.** `property`/`room_type`/`availability` (`0005`), Storage buckets + image upload, host create-listing wizard (customer host-mode), draft→pending submit, **admin listings-review** (approve/reject/suspend via `admin-actions`). Full listing lifecycle visible. *Deliverable: listing state machine end-to-end.*

**M3 — Discovery.** Explore screen: wilaya/commune filter, dates, guests, property type, amenities, map + list; listing detail with gallery, reviews, availability calendar. Seeded listings render in AR-RTL/FR/EN. *Deliverable: searchable catalog.*

**M4 — Booking + payments (core of MVP).** `booking`/`transaction` (`0006`), `create-booking` (server-side price/availability re-check), **`create-checkout` → Chargily** redirect, **`chargily-webhook`** confirmation (HMAC-verified, idempotent), **`baridipay-confirm`** manual flow, confirmation screen + email/notification. *Deliverable: the full discover→book→pay→confirm loop with both providers.* **← MVP complete.**

**M5 — Reviews, favorites, messaging.** `review` (gated to completed stays), `favorite`/wishlists, `conversation`/`message` via Realtime (guest↔host). *Deliverable: social + comms layer.*

**M6 — Hotel dashboard.** `apps/hotel`: room/rate management, multi-roomtype availability calendar, reservations list, front-desk check-in for `hotel_staff`. *Deliverable: hotel operator surface on seeded 24-room hotel.*

**M7 — Payouts, disputes, notifications, admin KPIs (§14 extras).** `payout`/`run-payouts` (pg_cron) + admin release, `dispute` workflow, notifications center, admin KPI dashboard (GMV in DZD, bookings, occupancy). Hardening: pgTAP RLS suite, E2E happy path, accessibility/RTL audit pass.

**Deliverables-checklist mapping:** repo/tooling/env → **M0**; auth/roles → **M1**; listing lifecycle + admin → **M2**; search → **M3**; bookings + Chargily/BaridiPay + edge functions → **M4**; reviews/favorites/chat → **M5**; hotel multi-roomtype → **M6**; payouts/disputes/KPIs + test/CI hardening → **M7**. Seed data and generated-types flow are continuously maintained from **M0** onward.

**Sources:** [Chargily Pay v2 webhooks](https://dev.chargily.com/pay-v2/webhooks) · [Supabase generating types](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/api/rest/generating-types) · [Supabase local development](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/local-development/overview) · [Expo Localization](https://docs.expo.dev/guides/localization/) · [Expo RTL issue #23629](https://github.com/expo/expo/issues/23629)
